comparison_with_build8.conclusion: double-write fix had NO effect on Copilot is_http2=2

diagnosis.root_cause: is_http2=2 returns 200 OK with SSE headers but zero data frames, keeping the stream open indefinitely
diagnosis.double_write_fix_effect: NOT effective for Copilot - same empty SSE stream as Build #8
diagnosis.ux_problem: infinite hang is worse than error message - user sees Thinking... forever
action_needed: Need to either: (a) send SSE data with warning text, or (b) close the stream properly
Option B: send stream-end signal so Copilot shows 'interrupted' instead of hanging
